channel.title: Observibility on Craig Yang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Observibility on Craig Yang's Blog

item.title: Observability
item.description: Learn about observability in modern systems — the three pillars of logs, metrics, and traces — and how they help you debug unknown unknowns in microservice architectures.

item.title: System Log Collection With Grafana Loki and Alloy
item.description: How to collect and centralize system logs using Grafana Alloy and Loki, with a hands-on lab using Nginx, Docker, and Grafana for log visualization.

item.title: Container Monitoring With cAdvisor
item.description: Monitor Docker containers with cAdvisor and visualize container metrics in Grafana using Prometheus as the data source.

item.title: Visualized Monitoring With Prometheus and Grafana
item.description: Set up Prometheus to collect host and Nginx metrics, then visualize them with Grafana dashboards using Docker Compose.
